title: Bojun Guo
text: Home * People * Bojun Guo Bojun Guo , (alias noobpwnftw) a Caribbean pirate [1] , computer chess and computer Xiangqi developer, supporter and sponsor, as well as active member in computer chess forums and social media . He donates high-quality hardware for some communities such as Fishtest [2] , OpenBench [3] , TCEC [4] , and Talkchess . Contents 1 7-man Syzygy Bases 2 Cloud Databases 3 Forum Posts 3.1 2016 ... 3.2 2020 ... 4 External Links 5 References 7-man Syzygy Bases [ edit ] In an 5-month attempt in 2018 - supported by Ronald de Man - Bojun Guo has generated all 7-men tables of Syzygy Bases [5] [6] . Cloud Databases [ edit ] Bojun Guo is author of the Chess Cloud Database Query Interface [7] and the Xiangqi Cloud Database Query Interface [8] . The APIs will provide online position analysis as well as EGTB results where available [9] . Forum Posts [ edit ] 2016 ...
